name: VF
description: Sink molar vapor fraction (forward flow)\nVLE: unbounded VFu where VFu < 0 is subcooled, VFu = 0 is the bubble point, VFu = 1 is the dew point, and VFu > 1 is superheated\nVLLE: bounded VF (0 ≤ VF ≤ 1) where VF = 0 is the bubble point (or subcooled) and VF = 1 is the dew point (or superheated)

name: setp
description: Sink inlet pressure is set by upstream device
